summary: Iteration 34: Mi Día (My Day) Page Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 11 test scenarios verified. Full CRUD flow working for tareas and interacciones, 2-step interaction modal with next action workflow functional.

minor.issue: Returns 'items' key instead of 'rows' (inconsistent with mi_dia.py router which uses 'rows'). Two routers define GET /api/tareas - server.py uses 'items', mi_dia.py uses 'rows'

console_warnings.issue: ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications - benign browser/React warning, not an actual error

passed_tests: 1. Backend: GET /api/my-day returns correct structure (date, tasks_overdue, tasks_today, next_actions_today, risk_accounts, stats) ✓
2. Backend: POST /api/tareas creates a task with correct fields (id, cuenta_id, title, due_at, priority, note, status=OPEN, created_at) ✓
3. Backend: POST /api/tareas/{id}/done marks task as DONE with done_at timestamp ✓
4. Backend: POST /api/interacciones creates an interaction with correct fields (id, cuenta_id, channel, outcome, note, happened_at, created_at) ✓
5. Backend: GET /api/interaction-templates returns 6 seeded templates (Cobranza pendiente, Confirmo pedido, Envie catalogo, Llame - no respondio, Pidio reposicion, Visita realizada) ✓
6. Backend: GET /api/users returns user list with id, usuario, nombre fields ✓
7. Frontend: /mi-dia page loads with 4 sections (Vencidas, Hoy, Cuentas a contactar, En riesgo) ✓
8. Frontend: Stats pills show in header (Abiertas, Vencidas, Llamadas, WhatsApp) with correct values ✓
9. Frontend: Clicking '+' button on a task row opens the Interaction modal ✓
10. Frontend: Interaction modal shows templates, channel buttons (WhatsApp/Llamada/Visita/Otro), outcome select, note textarea ✓
11. Frontend: Sidebar has 'Mi Dia' as first item with Sun icon ✓
critical_code_review_comments: MiDiaPage.jsx: Well-structured with proper loading state, API error handling via toast, and data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
InteractionModal.jsx: Clean 2-step flow implementation with templates, channel selection, outcome dropdown, and next action workflow
mi_dia.py router: Comprehensive CRUD operations with proper authentication, UUID handling for cuenta_id, and phone formatting helper
Layout.jsx: Mi Dia correctly placed as first nav item with Sun icon from lucide-react
MINOR: Two routers define GET /api/tareas (server.py and mi_dia.py) with different response formats - potential maintenance issue
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks and interactions during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - left in database for regression testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mi Día page fully functional. Login uses 'usuario' field not 'email'. Test cuenta_id: bfbb0f46-d34c-4c1e-b763-1676bd927de7. The GET /api/tareas endpoint returns 'items' key (not 'rows'). Templates seeded: Cobranza pendiente, Confirmo pedido, Envie catalogo, Llame - no respondio, Pidio reposicion, Visita realizada. Interaction modal has 2 steps: interaction registration -> next action setup.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All Mi Día features working as specified.
